message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber

title Provider Login Into Provider App =

participant "Resident" as Resident
participant "WeResident" as WeResident
participant "WeID" as WeID
participant "WeService" as WeService

Resident -> WeResident: Send username:password /login

alt [Provider already exist]
    WeResident -> WeID: Get Token by username:password\n/oauth/authorize
    activate WeID
    WeID --> WeResident: Return Token to WeResident
    deactivate WeID
    WeResident -> Resident: Return {"token": "jwt-token"}
end

== Provider Query/Search Service ==

Resident -> WeService: Query services including token\n/weservices/services\nHeader\nAuthorization: Bear {jwt-token}
note right of Resident: Query Service schema\n{"query":"string","status":12}

alt [above token is valid]
    WeService -> WeID: verify token
    activate WeID
    WeID --> WeService: 200
    deactivate WeID
    WeService -> Resident: Response services data
    note left of Resident: Service Data Array schema\n[{"id":"string","company":"string","name":"string","rate":4.2,"image":"image.png"},{}],\n"total":10,"currentPage":1,"perPage":5
else [Token is expired/invalid]
    WeService -> WeID: verify token
    activate WeID
    WeID --> WeService: 400
    deactivate WeID
    WeService -> Resident: Response 401 status
end

== Create Order(Request) ==

Resident -> WeService: Create Service\nPOST: /weservices/service/{serviceID}/order
note right of Resident: Order Request schema\n{"resident":"$userID",\n"service":"$serviceID",\n"pricingModel":{},\n"noteDetail":"string",\n"address":"string",\n"schedule":Time}

WeService -> WeID: verify token
activate WeID
WeID --> WeService: 200
deactivate WeID
WeService -> Resident: Response Service Data(JSON)

Resident -> WeService: Comment(chat) in Order\nPOST: /weservices/order/{orderId}/comment
note right of Resident: Comment Data\n{"content":"string"}

WeService -> WeID: verify token
activate WeID
WeID --> WeService: 200
deactivate WeID
WeService -> Resident: 200

@enduml
```
